message:
test(conformance): add glow Go reference fixtures

Adds the Go-generated reference fixtures for glow conformance testing.
These were created by running the Go glow binary and capturing its
output for comparison with the Rust implementation.

The fixtures cover:
- Configuration validation
- Markdown rendering output
- Style application (dark, light, ascii, pink, auto, no-tty)

Two copies exist due to the conformance test structure:
- tests/conformance/fixtures/go_outputs/glow.json
- tests/conformance/go_reference/fixtures/go_outputs/glow.json

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
